projects.title: MASO.CORP // INDUSTRIAL SUPPLY
UMPRUM Type
projects.description: Student-run type foundry website. Single-page application with JSON-driven content, Decap CMS, massive typography, randomized warm palettes, spring-physics hover animations. Plain HTML/CSS/JS on Netlify.

projects.title: OFST Studio
projects.description: Studio identity and website for OFST — headless CMS and premium web studio based in Prague. Astro production build, three-tier service model, audit-as-lead-magnet funnel.

projects.title: Leather Parfum
projects.description: Multi-brand e-commerce ecosystem for a luxury leather goods and perfumery house. Shopify-based platform serving Czech, Vietnamese, and English-speaking markets with B2C storefront and B2B wholesale portal. Strategic vision expanded to Inditex-style holding structure with multiple style-based sub-brands.

projects.title: Glagolitische Fragmente
projects.description:
# Glagolitische Fragmente

A web-based digitalization and typographic interpretation of the historical book "Glagolitische Fragmente" (1857) by Karl Adolph Constantin Höfler and Paul Joseph Šafařík.

Developed as part of the **Clausura (Winter Semester)** project at the **[AAAD / UMPRUM](https://www.umprum.cz/) Studio of Typography**.

**[View Live Website](https://yunglordsimens.github.io/haase/)**

---

![Website Preview](preview.gif)

---

## About the Project

This project explores the digital translation of historical Glagolitic scripts and texts. It combines modern web technologies with custom type design to reimagine the original manuscript for a digital context.

**Date:** January 2023

## Typography

The website features custom typefaces designed specifically for this digitalization project, focusing on the historical accuracy and aesthetic of the Glagolitic script within a contemporary layout.

## Credits

| Role | Name |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Art Direction** | Maria Chernobay |
| **Development** | Oleksandr Hohulia |
| **Custom Fonts** | Maria Chernobay, Anna Ivakhno, Viktoria Naumuk |

## Tech Stack

* HTML5 / CSS3
* JavaScript
* GitHub Pages

projects.title: Lee's Tea
projects.description: Website for a tea house in Prague. Clean, warm, functional. Second site for the owner's new coffee shop is in development.

projects.title: Typeface Specimen
projects.description: Original typeface designed in Glyphs. Variable weight axis, Cyrillic and Latin character sets. Specimen booklet printed on Risograph.
